cases.title: Edit profile
cases.description:
**Description :** Verify user can update profile information.

**Steps to reproduce :**

1. Go to profile
2. Click Edit profile
3. Change username/bio
4. Save changes

**Expected result :**
Profile information updates successfully.

cases.title: Upload/change profile picture
cases.description:
**Description :** Verify user can upload/change profile picture.

**Steps to reproduce :**
1. Open profile
2. Click profile picture
3. Upload new image
4. Save

**Expected result :**
New profile picture is displayed successfully.

cases.title: Change password
cases.description:
**Description :** Verify user can change password.
**Steps to reproduce :**

1. Go to Settings
2. Open Change Password
3. Enter old password
4. Enter new password
5. Save

**Expected result :**
Password updated successfully.
